functions.label: ContentListTable
signature: (({ title, tableLayout, compressed, scrollableInline, responsiveBreakpoint, noItemsMessage, children, filter, "data-test-subj": dataTestSubj, }:
) => React.JSX.Element | null) & { Column: any; Action: any; }

children.label:
{
  title,
  tableLayout = 'auto',
  compressed = false,
  scrollableInline = true,
  responsiveBreakpoint = false,
  noItemsMessage,
  children,
  filter,
  'data-test-subj': dataTestSubj = 'content-list-table',
}

functions.label: CreatedByCell
description:
Cell renderer for `Column.CreatedBy`.

Self-loading: uses `useProfile(uid)` which triggers a batched load if the
profile is not yet cached. Multiple cells mounting in the same frame get
their requests batched into a single `bulkResolve`.

All avatar types are clickable: clicking toggles an include filter,
holding Cmd/Ctrl toggles exclude. Managed items use the `__managed__`
sentinel, items without a creator use `__no_creator__`, and regular
items filter by their UID.

functions.label: getRowId
description: Get a stable row ID for EuiBasicTable's `itemId` prop.

children.label: id
description: - The item's ID.

functions.label: NameCell
description:
Default rich renderer for the name column that includes:
- Clickable title (with href or onClick).
- Inline star button (if `showStarred` is true and `supports.starred`).
- Description (if available and `showDescription` is true).
- Tag badges (if available and `showTags` is true).

When `showTags` is true, clicking a tag badge toggles a filter on the
content list (include on click, exclude on modifier+click). Provide
`onTagClick` to override this behavior.

Memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders when parent table re-renders.
signature: > & { readonly type: ({ item, showDescription, showTags, showStarred, onClick, shouldUseHref, onTagClick, }:

functions.label: NameCellTags
description:
Renders tag badges below the title/description in the name cell.

Provides a built-in click handler that toggles tag filters on the
content list state:
- **Click**: toggles the tag as an include filter.
- **Modifier+click** (Cmd on macOS, Ctrl on Windows/Linux): toggles
  the tag as an exclude filter.

Consumers can override this behavior via the `onTagClick` prop.

functions.label: StarButton
description:
Thin wrapper around `FavoriteButton` that renders `null` when
`supports.starred` is false. Shared by `StarredCell` and `NameCell`.

functions.label: StarredCell
description:
Cell renderer for `Column.Starred`. Centers the star button in the
narrow fixed-width column. The star button is always visible (not hover-only).

functions.label: UpdatedAtCell
description:
Cell renderer for the `UpdatedAt` column.

Displays the last updated timestamp with the following formatting:
- Within the last 7 days: locale-aware relative time via `FormattedRelative`
  from `@kbn/i18n-react` (e.g., "2 hours ago"). Auto-updates as time passes.
- Older than 7 days: abbreviated absolute date (e.g., "Jan 5, 2025").
- Missing value: dash with tooltip "Last updated unknown".

A tooltip always shows the full date and time (e.g., "January 5, 2025 3:42 PM").

Memoized to prevent unnecessary re-renders when parent table re-renders.

functions.label: useSelection
description:
Hook to integrate content list selection with `EuiBasicTable`.

Bridges the provider's selection state with `EuiBasicTable`'s `selection` prop
using **controlled mode** (`selected`). This ensures programmatic selection
changes (e.g., clearing after delete) are reflected in the table checkboxes.

interfaces.label: ActionNamespace
description:
Namespace interface for `Action` sub-components.

The base `Action` accepts

; pre-built actions
are properties (e.g., `Action.Edit`, `Action.Delete`, `Action.Inspect`).

interfaces.label: ActionProps
description:
Props for the `Action` component (custom actions).

Custom actions are identified by `props.id` and provide their own
behavior. Pre-built actions (like `Action.Edit`) have dedicated
preset components with their own props interfaces.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for the action.

children.label: name
description: Display name for the action (shown in menu and tooltip).

children.label: description
description: Accessible description for the action.

children.label: icon
description: Icon type (EUI icon name).

children.label: type
description: Render type: `'icon'` (compact) or `'button'` (full).

children.label: color
description: Icon/button color (matches EUI button color palette).

children.label: onClick
description: Click handler.

children.label: href
description: Link href (string or function returning href per item).

children.label: enabled
description: Whether the action is enabled for a given item.

children.label: available
description: Whether the action is available (visible) for a given item.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Test subject for testing.

interfaces.label: ActionsColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column.Actions` preset component.

These are the declarative attributes consumers pass in JSX. The actions builder
reads them directly from the parsed attributes.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Custom column title. Defaults to `'Actions'`.

children.label: sticky
description: Whether to stick the actions column to the right side during horizontal scroll.

children.label: children
description:
Action children.

When provided, only the specified actions are rendered in the given order.
When omitted, actions are determined automatically from the provider config
(e.g., edit is shown if `getEditUrl` or `onEdit` is configured, delete is
shown if `onDelete` is configured).

interfaces.label: ColumnNamespace
description:
Namespace interface for `Column` sub-components.

The base `Column` accepts

; pre-built columns
are properties (e.g., `Column.Name`, `Column.Actions`).

children.label: Starred
description: Pre-built star-toggle column for favoritable items.

children.label: props
description: - {@link StarredColumnProps}

children.label: CreatedBy
description: Pre-built "Created by" avatar column.

children.label: props
description: - {@link CreatedByColumnProps}

interfaces.label: ColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column` component (custom columns).

Custom columns are identified by `props.id` and provide their own
`render` function. Pre-built columns (like `Column.Name`) have
dedicated preset components with their own props interfaces.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for the column.

children.label: name
description: Display name for the column header.

children.label: sortable
description: Whether the column is sortable.

children.label: field
description:
Optional field name to use for sorting and/or value lookup.

Defaults to the column `id` when omitted.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Optional test subject for the column header/cells.

children.label: skeleton
description:
Optional skeleton descriptor for this custom column during initial load.

Use this when the column renders something richer than ordinary text,
such as an avatar, badge, icon, or multi-line cell. When omitted, the
table infers a text-like skeleton from the resolved column metadata.

children.label: render
description: Render function for the column cells.

interfaces.label: ContentListTableProps
description: Props for ContentListTable component.

children.label: title
description: Accessible title for the table (used as table caption for screen readers).

children.label: tableLayout
description: Table layout mode.

children.label: compressed
description: Compressed table style.

children.label: scrollableInline
description:
Whether to enable horizontal scrolling when columns exceed the container width.
Required for sticky columns (e.g. `Column.Actions` with `sticky: true`).

children.label: responsiveBreakpoint
description:
Named breakpoint below which the table collapses into responsive cards.
Set to `false` to always render as a table, or `true` to always render cards.

Content List defaults to `false` because the card layout does not support
selection checkboxes, tag badges, star buttons, or action columns.

children.label: noItemsMessage
description:
Custom message to display when a search or filter returns zero results.
When omitted, `EuiBasicTable` renders its built-in empty row. Has no
effect when the whole list is empty; `<ContentList>` owns that state.

children.label: children
description:
Column components as children.
If no children provided, defaults to Name column.

children.label: filter
description:
Optional filter function to filter items from the provider.
Useful when multiple tables share a single provider but display different subsets.

**Important:** This function should be memoized (e.g., with `useCallback`) to prevent
unnecessary re-filtering on every render.

children.label: 'data-test-subj'
description: Test subject for testing.

interfaces.label: CreatedByCellProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: createdBy
description: The user ID (`uid`) of the item's creator.

children.label: managed
description: Whether the item is system-managed (e.g. part of a package).

interfaces.label: CreatedByColumnProps
description: Props for the `Column.CreatedBy` preset component.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Override column header text. Defaults to "Created by".

interfaces.label: DeleteActionProps
description: Props for the `Action.Delete` preset component.

children.label: label
description: Custom label for the delete action. Defaults to `'Delete'`.

children.label: enabled
description: Per-item guard. When provided, disables the action for items where this returns `false`.

interfaces.label: EditActionProps
description: Props for the `Action.Edit` preset component.

children.label: label
description: Custom label for the edit action. Defaults to `'Edit'`.

children.label: enabled
description: Per-item guard. When provided, disables the action for items where this returns `false`.

interfaces.label: InspectActionProps
description: Props for the `Action.Inspect` preset component.

children.label: label
description: Custom label for the inspect action. Defaults to `'View {itemTitle} details'`.

children.label: item
signature: Record<string, unknown> & { id: string; title: string; description?: string | undefined; type?: string | undefined; updatedAt?: Date | undefined; tags?: string[] | undefined; createdAt?: string | undefined; createdBy?: string | undefined; updatedBy?: string | undefined; managed?: boolean | undefined; }

children.label: showDescription
description: Whether to show the description.

children.label: showTags
description:
Whether to show tags below the title/description.
Requires `item.tags` to contain tag IDs and a tags service
to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

children.label: showStarred
description:
Whether to show a star button inline after the title.
Requires `services.favorites` to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

children.label: onClick
description:
Optional click handler for the title.
When provided, the provider-level `item.getHref` is ignored unless
`shouldUseHref` is explicitly `true`.

children.label: shouldUseHref
description:
Whether to use the provider-level `item.getHref` for the title link.
Defaults to `true` unless `onClick` is provided.

children.label: onTagClick
description:
Optional click handler for tag badges.
When omitted, the built-in handler in

toggles
include/exclude filters via `useContentListFilters`.

children.label: tagIds
description: Tag IDs to render.

children.label: onTagClick
description:
Optional override for the tag click handler.
When omitted, the built-in handler toggles include/exclude
filters via

interfaces.label: NameColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column.Name` preset component.

These are the declarative attributes consumers pass in JSX. The name builder
reads them directly from the parsed attributes.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Custom column title. Defaults to `'Name'`.

children.label: sortable
description: Whether the column is sortable.

children.label: showDescription
description: Whether to show the description.

children.label: showTags
description:
Whether to show tags below the title/description.
Requires `item.tags` to contain tag IDs and a tags service
to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

Auto-enabled when the provider has `supports.tags === true`
(i.e., a tags service is configured). Set to `false` to
explicitly disable tags even when the service is available.

children.label: showStarred
description:
Whether to show a star button inline after the title.
Requires `services.favorites` to be configured on the `ContentListProvider`.

children.label: onClick
description:
Optional click handler for the title.
When provided, the provider-level `item.getHref` is ignored unless
`shouldUseHref` is explicitly `true`.

children.label: shouldUseHref
description:
Whether to use the provider-level `item.getHref` for the title link.
Defaults to `true` unless `onClick` is provided.

children.label: onTagClick
description:
Optional click handler for tag badges.
Called with the tag and a boolean indicating whether a modifier key
(Cmd on Mac, Ctrl on Windows/Linux) was held during the click.
Only effective when `showTags` is `true`.

children.label: render
description: Custom render function (overrides default rendering).

interfaces.label: StarButtonProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: id
description: Item ID to star/unstar.

children.label: className
description: Optional CSS `className` for alignment styles.

children.label: wrapperCss
description:
Optional Emotion styles applied to a wrapping `span`.
Use for margin adjustments when rendered inline (e.g. inside

interfaces.label: StarredCellProps
description: Props for the
component.

children.label: id
description: Item ID to render the star button for.

interfaces.label: StarredColumnProps
description: Props for the `Column.Starred` preset component.

children.label: width
description: Column width (CSS value). Defaults to `'40px'`.

children.label: updatedAt
description: The `updatedAt` value from the content list item.

interfaces.label: UpdatedAtColumnProps
description:
Props for the `Column.UpdatedAt` preset component.

These are the declarative attributes consumers pass in JSX. The builder
reads them directly from the parsed attributes.

children.label: columnTitle
description: Custom column title. Defaults to `'Last updated'`.

children.label: sortable
description: Whether the column is sortable.

interfaces.label: UseSelectionReturn
description: Return type for the
hook.

children.label: selection
description:
Selection configuration for `EuiBasicTable`'s `selection` prop.
Returns `undefined` when selection is not supported (e.g., read-only mode).

misc.label: DeleteAction
description:
Delete action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the delete action (with confirmation) within a `Column.Actions` context.

misc.label: EditAction
description:
Edit action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the edit action within a `Column.Actions` context.

misc.label: InspectAction
description:
Inspect action preset component for `ContentListTable`.

This is a declarative component that doesn't render anything.
It specifies the inspect (view details) action within a `Column.Actions` context.
Opens the content editor flyout for the selected item.
